In this lesson, I’ll teach you the exact process of how
July does supply chain. You’ll get to see how each
of the strategies and methods I taught you in this
module ultimately come together.

JULY: A CASE STUDY
MODULE:
MANUFACTURING &
OPERATIONS AT SCALE

❏ 	Go out and apply all of the lessons you’ve learned
in this module to your supply chain process.
